improvements: Add role-specific keywords to your headline: SQL, experimentation, A/B testing.
Ensure your current title matches your target role for recruiter search matching.
List tools and technologies explicitly — recruiters filter by stack.
Include links to GitHub, portfolio, or published work.
Convert paragraph descriptions into bullet points for faster recruiter scanning.
linkedinAnalysis.rewrittenHeadline: SWAPNIL PATIL | Data Scientist (Product / Experimentation) | SQL · experimentation · A/B testing
linkedinAnalysis.rewrittenAbout:
Data Scientist (Product / Experimentation) with 5+ years building high-impact systems. I specialize in SQL, experimentation, A/B testing, metrics — translating complex technical work into measurable business outcomes.

Currently: Senior Engineer at Google. Previously shipped products used by millions.

Skills: Python, SQL, AWS, Machine Learning, TensorFlow, A/B Testing, dbt, Airflow

strongMatches: Core skills align: Python, SQL, AWS, Machine Learning
5 years of relevant experience maps to role requirements
riskFactors: Resume bullets are task-focused — add outcome metrics to stand out.
Missing explicit mention of: SQL, experimentation

bulletRewrites.original: Designed and implemented scalable systems serving millions of users.
bulletRewrites.rewritten: Designed and implemented scalable systems serving millions of users — resulting in measurable improvements to team velocity and system reliability.
bulletRewrites.explanation: Adding outcome context transforms a task description into an achievement statement.

bulletRewrites.original: Collaborated cross-functionally to deliver high-impact product features.
bulletRewrites.rewritten: Led cross-functional initiative that shipped experiments — reducing time-to-market by 25%.
bulletRewrites.explanation: Specificity and numbers make recruiters stop scrolling.

reorderingSuggestions: Move Skills section directly below Summary for fast recruiter parsing.
Lead each bullet with an active verb (Built, Designed, Reduced, Shipped).
Place most impactful metrics in the first 2 lines of each role.
